objects.prompt: VIEW TOP DOWN 2D "Pixel art game asset, 32x32 sprite sheet. Theme: Modern city urban props. Include a collection of: metal fire hydrant, electrical utility box, wooden and metal bench, street trash bin, traffic cones, and a small urban plant pot. Style: 90s anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, bold dark outlines, flat color palette. Perspective: Top-down, consistent lighting source from the top-right. Isolated on a neutral white background for easy transparency removal. High readability, minimal dithering."
